file: 1424_Lanzafame 等 - 2017 - Effect of the Structure and Mesoporosity in NiZeolite Catalysts for n ‐Hexadecane Hydroisome.txt

experiments.reaction_type: 加氢异构化/加氢裂化反应
experiments.description: 使用正十六烷作为模型化合物，在Ni/沸石催化剂（H-MFI、H-Beta及其脱硅改性样品）和Ni/无定形硅铝（ASA）参比催化剂上进行加氢异构化和加氢裂化反应测试。反应条件：压力30 bar，温度275°C，重时空速4 h⁻¹，H₂/n-C₁₆摩尔比7.5。
experiments.text_snippet: The Ni-zeolite samples were studied in the hydroisomerisation and hydrocracking of n-hexadecane... The catalytic behaviour was investigated on a bench-scale apparatus, using as reaction conditions a pressure of 30 bar, a temperature of 275°C, and a WHSV of 4 h⁻¹.

Product yield.original: {'Gas yield': ['Ni/ASA: 0.3 wt%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 36.2 wt%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 3.1 wt%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 9.1 wt%'], 'Liquid yield': ['Ni/ASA: 99.7 wt%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 63.8 wt%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 96.9 wt%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 90.9 wt%']}

Product Selectivity.original: {'Gases': ['Ni/ASA: 7.8%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 38.0%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 5.0%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 11.1%'], 'n-C₅-C₁₀': ['Ni/ASA: 5.7%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 36.2%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 1.8%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 4.6%'], 'n-C₁₁-C₁₅': ['Ni/ASA: 0.0%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 0.1%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 3.6%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 3.3%'], 'i-C₅-C₁₀': ['Ni/ASA: 1.6%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 23.8%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 5.2%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 9.0%'], 'i-C₁₁-C₁₅': ['Ni/ASA: 7.8%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 0.4%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 26.7%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 26.7%'], 'i-C₁₆': ['Ni/ASA: 77.1%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 0.0%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 56.6%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 44.0%'], 'Naphthenes': ['Ni/ASA: 0.0%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 1.5%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 1.1%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 1.3%']}

Catalyst stability.original: {'Coke deposition': ['Ni/ASA: 18.3 wt%', 'Ni/H-MFI: 19.3 wt%', 'Ni/H-Beta: 9.6 wt%', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 10.5 wt%'], 'Rate of carbon production': ['Ni/ASA: 53.3 mgC/(g_cat·g_n-C₁₆_in)', 'Ni/H-MFI: 134.8 mgC/(g_cat·g_n-C₁₆_in)', 'Ni/H-Beta: 95.3 mgC/(g_cat·g_n-C₁₆_in)', 'Ni/Des H-Beta: 84.0 mgC/(g_cat·g_n-C₁₆_in)']}
